payload.answer: I can’t safely apply the proposed memory change because the prior output was invalid or unsafe. Please choose a repair option or provide the corrected fact you want considered.
repair_options: Escalate this memory update to a stronger validation step before any change is made.
Reject the unsafe/invalid proposal and make no memory changes.
Ask the user to restate the intended memory fact in a clear, durable form.
If this is an additive fact, offer to add it separately only after validation, without merging it into existing memories.
If this is meant to replace or correct an existing memory, ask the user to identify the existing fact and the intended replacement.

raw_text: {"answer":"I can’t safely apply the proposed memory change because the prior output was invalid or unsafe.
